job_summary: PayPal has been revolutionizing commerce globally for more than 25 years, empowering consumers and businesses to thrive in the global economy. The Sr Software Engineer will deliver complete solutions across all phases of the Software Development Lifecycle, advise management on project-level issues, guide junior engineers, and operate with minimal supervision while applying technical best practices.
